headline: Shuffle Board: On Names Co-CEOs, Kornit Digital Taps Asos Chief Exec
summary: Former Asos exec Nick Deighton joins the digital fashion firm as strategic advisor while Swiss shoemaker On announced its co-founders as co-CEOs.
